description: Scan a QMS documentation directory and report which ISO 13485:2016 required procedures and key documents are present vs missing, with a compliance percentage and prioritized recommendations (read-only).
rules: recurses DOCS_DIR; reads .txt/.md content, matches .doc/.docx/.pdf/.odt by filename only
keyword-matches ISO 13485:2016 documented procedures + key documents (Quality Manual, MDF, Quality Policy, Quality Objectives)
usage: Set DOCS_DIR (the directory of existing QMS documents). Output: gap-report.json.
limitation: Keyword/filename matching only — presence, not quality, of documentation. Binary formats (.doc/.docx/.pdf/.odt) are matched by filename, not full-text extraction. Pure stdlib (no external libraries required).
